name: ceiling_guard_dormancy_nat_vent_active_in_band
description: ODE ceiling guard stays dormant when nat-vent is active AND indoor is within comfort band. Outdoor cooler than indoor provides free cooling — no HVAC escalation needed.

verdict.summary: Ceiling guard correctly defers to nat-vent when outdoor is cooler than indoor and indoor is within the comfort band
verdict.observed_behavior: nat_vent_active=True with indoor 73F within band [70F, 74F], outdoor 65F — ceiling guard bypassed
verdict.expected_behavior: ceiling guard dormant (bypassed), nat-vent continues, no HVAC intervention

events.note: Morning: indoor 73F within comfort band [70F, 74F], outdoor 65F (8F cooler than indoor — nat-vent favorable)
Window opens: outdoor 65F < indoor 73F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F, outdoor < threshold 77F — nat-vent activates
30 min later: indoor still 73F (within band), outdoor still 65F. Nat-vent providing free cooling. Ceiling guard should remain dormant — ODE branch is bypassed entirely when nat-vent is active.

assertions.reason: sensor_open: outdoor 65F < indoor 73F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F, outdoor 65F <= threshold 77F — nat-vent activates

temp_update with nat-vent active and indoor 73F within band [70F, 74F], outdoor 65F < indoor: no exit condition fires (indoor > comfort_heat, outdoor < indoor, outdoor < threshold). Ceiling guard is bypassed by simulator routing when nat_vent_active=True. Nat-vent continues as expected.
